title: Viners Everyday Breeze 16 Piece 18/0 Silver Stainless Steel Cutlery Set
features: CLASSIC CUTLERY | This contemporary cutlery set is effortlessly stylish and is a modern twist on the classic teardrop shape. The cutlery is expertly balanced with a ridge design on slender, smooth and elegant handles that are a delight to hold.

16 PIECE SET | Make adding the finishing touch to any table setting a Breeze! This versatile set is perfect for everyday use and includes four dinner knives, four dinner forks, four tea spoons and four dessert spoons packaged in a beautiful gift box
STRENGTH & DURABILITY | Made from fine quality 18/0 steel, our cutlery is polished to a mirror finish. The long-lasting set is rust-resistant and can be used in the dishwasher.

YOUR DAILY BREEZE | The Everyday collection is sophisticated with its modern designs. Find the one that suits your needs from any of our varying 16 piece sets in this range, from Glisten, Fleur or Purity.

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cutlery that comes with a 15-year of guarantee.
description: From the manufacturer Tabac Cutlery Set Gift Box Sphere Cutlery Set Angel Cutlery Set Gift Box Twist Cutlery Set Gift Box Fleur Cutlery Set Gift Box Glamour Cutlery Set Gift Box Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 279 4.2 out of 5 stars 46 4.5 out of 5 stars 823 4.6 out of 5 stars 167 4.9 out of 5 stars 15 4.6 out of 5 stars 523 Price £41.32 £ 41 . 32 — no data — no data — no data — no data — no data Description With a handle design that gently flows to form a classic teardrop shape, the Tabac cutlery set is made from quality 18/0 stainless steel with a high mirror polish. The Viners Sphere cutlery set features a beautiful simplistic design adding sophistication to any table. Made from quality 18.0 stainless steel and each piece of cutlery is finished with a high mirror polish. A graceful arc sweeps across Angels contemporary handle forming a subtle curve. The rust-resistant Angel 24 piece cutlery set is made with quality 18/0 stainless steel with a mirror finish. Elegantly shaped handles designed to appear with a twist. Simple for everyday use but equally perfect in a formal setting. Mirror finish. With a striking textured pattern, Fleur will be sure to add a unique style to your dining experience. Made from quality 18.0 stainless steel with a mirror finish. The hammered texture and mirror finish of this Glamour cutlery set creates a shimmering display of light, bringing undeniable 'Glamour' to your dining table.
